steps.comment: Submit high tax - with seed 0, first d6 roll = 1 (<=2), revolt triggered
Advance: revolt deals -2 HP (10 -> 8), no gold collected on revolt
Submit taxation to give country some gold (2*5=10 gold from high tax)
Submit valid build_army action for 5 gold
Try to submit another build_army for 16 gold - should be rejected (only 20 total, 5 already pending)

expected.rejection_reason: insufficient gold: trying to spend 21 but only have 20 (including pending actions)

steps.comment: Verify only the first action is pending
Add another country for war tests
Try to submit no_attack - should be rejected (already have attack pending)

expected.rejection_reason: already have an attack action pending, cannot submit another war action

expected.rejection_reason: merchant already has an assessment action pending

steps.comment: Test: Cannot submit both low and high peasant tax - advance to next taxation phase
Try to submit high tax - should be rejected
